channel.title: AI PM Course Changelog
channel.description: Freshness and curriculum updates for AI PM Course alumni

item.title: AI PM Course: Expanded Wave 2 operating-rigor curriculum
item.description: MODULE 4 / 6 / 7 / 9 / 11 / 12 · 4.2 / 6.7 / 7.8-7.10 / 9.6 / 11.2 / 12.10 · content — Added AI-native research, instrumentation analytics, prompt versioning, FinOps, multi-tenant safety, regulatory readiness, MENA privacy, and portfolio/interview readiness lessons.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added ten new implementation templates for Wave 2
item.description: TEMPLATES · operations pack · operations — Published new template set for event schema, session success, prompt review, FinOps, multi-tenant audit, MENA compliance, regulatory readiness, AI discovery prompts, and portfolio leveling artifacts.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added kill-criteria and eval-debt operating lessons
item.description: MODULE 1 / MODULE 6 · 1.5 / 6.6 · content — Expanded curriculum with pre-committed sunset discipline and post-launch eval-maintenance controls, plus linked artifact templates.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added structured failure anthology lesson and case renderer
item.description: MODULE 9 · 9.5 · content — Introduced six public, freshness-tracked failure cases with framework-mapped debrief prompts and direct debrief template integration.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added weekly artifact CI pack and setup guidance
item.description: MODULE 10 / GLOBAL · Capstone CI · operations — Created reusable workflow, verifier script, and setup guide to enforce decision memo, build, eval, and retrospective artifact discipline.

item.title: AI PM Course: Normalized Module 8.5 storage keys
item.description: MODULE 8.5 · Storage Runtime · metadata — Replaced legacy persisted key prefix 8.5-* with 8-5-* to prevent storage-key fragmentation in future migrations.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added lesson freshness badges and automation
item.description: GLOBAL · Freshness System · freshness re-verify — Introduced deterministic freshness status for each lesson and extended weekly CI to generate freshness reporting outputs.

item.title: AI PM Course: Integrated Micro-Teams 2026 executive reading
item.description: MODULE 12 · 12.2 / 12.6 / 12.7 · content — Added curated supplementary reading, graded analysis framing, and a 90-day pilot template for executive-track learners.
